rows.label: tev014201_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Nathan about the base camps located throughout Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Nathan about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Nathan about the base camps located throughout Mira.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_SEL0051
rows.name: Ask Nathan about the base camps in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_SEL0071
rows.name: Ask Nathan about the base camps in White Woods.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0001
rows.name:
As you explore Mira, you'll come
across base camps that have been
set up by the various Unions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0002
rows.name:
Any BLADE can use these camps, even
if they're from a different Union.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0003
rows.name:
If you're tired, you can use a
tent or trailer there and rest
up for as long as you like.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0004
rows.name:
If it's your first time visiting an area, it's always
a good idea to stop at a base camp and see what you
can learn about the place from the BLADEs there.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0005
rows.name:
Making good use of base camps can mitigate the risks of
exploring uncharted terrain. And that makes it a little
more likely that you'll find your way home to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0008
rows.name:
That Connor... When he got back to NLA, he
bought himself a nice sturdy belt chain so
he wouldn't drop his comm device again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0009
rows.name:
Isn't he precious? ...Still,
he really seems determined not
to screw up like that again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0010
rows.name:
Even Monica's putting the team first these days.
She actually went and apologized to Connor for
bad-mouthing him when he was just thinking of others.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0011
rows.name:
I was worried that the team might break
apart over what happened, so I'm relieved
that everyone managed to reconcile.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0012
rows.name:
Thanks a lot for your help. None of
this would have happened without you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0021
rows.name:
Maintaining base camps in
areas populated by violent
indigens is a dangerous job.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0022
rows.name:
So the BLADEs stationed there are real tough
customers. They have to be in order to survive
the perpetual battle to protect their camps.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0023
rows.name:
Anyway, if you have an open spot on
your team you'd like filled, you
should ask around at a base camp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0024
rows.name:
I'm sure you can find a good,
trustworthy BLADE who's willing
to help you explore the area.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0029
rows.name:
Needle Rock base camp is located in
the area just past Seabird's Beak.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0030
rows.name:
Some BLADEs stationed there found
a strange cave behind the giant
spherical plant east of the camp.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0031
rows.name:
But the cave was halfway up the inner side of the wall-
like cliffs that surround the continent, so even when they
approached from the sea, they weren't able to reach it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0032
rows.name:
It's an unexplored territory, you know. I bet
there's some sort of precious treasure inside.
Hard-to-reach places always contain treasure, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0033
rows.name:
Anyway, if you can get your hands on one
of those flying Dolls they're developing,
you should probably go check it out.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014201_MSG0043
rows.name:
Now that they're available for
fieldwork, maybe you should get a
Doll flight module and check it out?[ST:wait ]
